title: High-power four-quadrant converter system
title_zh: 一种大功率四象限变流器系统 (CN priority member)
assignee: Hefei Institutes of Physical Science, CAS
status_note: Active, expires 2044-08-05 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: kA-class 4Q system: double-secondary transformer, anti-parallel thyristor bridge pairs
indep_claim_gist: Converter system with double-secondary oil-immersed transformer feeding four thyristor rectifier bridges; bridge pairs share secondaries, inversely connected for forward/reverse output; reactor-based parallel current sharing; controller executes smooth four-quadrant current transitions (>100 kA class).
notes: CN priority member CN115940665A ALSO fetched run 1 at GP (pending there). Live to ~2044. Line-commutated thyristor scope — does not read on SiC PWM stages per se, but broad 4Q-system + current-sharing language is the main live CN-institute estate; design-around: PWM/WBG topologies, no shared-secondary anti-parallel pairs. U-014, U-018, U-020.

title: A high-power and high-current aluminum alloy converter module with four-quadrant operation
title_zh: 一种四象限运行的高功率大电流铝合金制变流模块
assignee: Institute of Plasma Physics, CAS (ASIPP)
status_note: Displays as Expired - Fee Related (terminated 2018-07-27) on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: modular 6-pulse anti-parallel bridges, water-cooled Al busbars, 12/18/24-pulse 4Q
indep_claim_gist: Modular six-pulse converter bridge in open non-in-phase anti-parallel structure using water-cooled aluminum-alloy bar conductors; multiple bridges combine to 12/18/24-pulse modules supporting four-quadrant operation for fusion magnet and electrolysis supplies.
notes: Displays as expired (fee) after only 2 years — ASIPP construction-claim posture, not maintained. Anchors CN facility-4Q expiry horizon; citation chase off this doc yielded CN115940665A family (verified) and CN115548795B (verified this pass). U-018 context.

title: Driving gradient coils of magnetic resonance imaging apparatus
assignee: Koninklijke Philips Electronics N.V.
status_note: Displays as Expired - Lifetime (anticipated expiration 2020-08-16) on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: modular gradient amplifier: unipolar-PWM modules + polarity-reversing output module
indep_claim_gist: Gradient amplifier with multiple first modules providing unipolar PWM control of DC input to generate unipolar waveforms, and at least one second module between first-module outputs and gradient coil selectively reversing polarity to produce bipolar drive waveforms.
notes: Family tie CONFIRMED this pass: US6323649B1 (Picker International, filed 1999-09-14, same modular unipolar-PWM + polarity-module claims, 24 claims) fetched at https://www.freepatentsonline.com/6323649.html per A-07. Displays expired 2020 — verify. THE architecture precedent for stacked-unipolar + polarity-block bipolar coil drive; design-freedom indicator. U-015 CC-loop context.

title: Bi-lateral four quadrant power converter
assignee: GTE Automatic Electric Laboratories Inc (later AG Communication Systems)
status_note: Displays as Expired - Fee Related (lapsed 1995-08-16) on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: isolated PWM 4Q converter, synchronous rectification, source and sink
indep_claim_gist: PWM power converter supplying variable-amplitude variable-polarity output while enabling bidirectional current flow, via synchronous rectifier switches driven from the same carrier as primary pulses through one high-frequency transformer, with low-pass output filtering.
notes: Telecom-lineage true-4Q heritage; lapsed 1995 (displays — verify). With US5428522A, US5317254A, US3566292A, US7710745B2 the classic 4Q layer is indicatively public domain — supports U-030 BOP-successor freedom read.

title: Four quadrant unipolar pulse width modulated inverter
assignee: Kaman Electromagnetics Corp (later DRS Power Technology)
status_note: Displays as Expired - Lifetime on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: H-bridge 4Q unipolar-PWM current control into inductive load, halved switching loss
indep_claim_gist: H-bridge with switching elements and antiparallel diodes controlled by algorithm alternating instantaneous load voltage between single-polarity and zero states to keep current within defined boundaries around the demanded value in an inductive load.
notes: Displays expired — verify. Canonical unipolar-PWM 4Q current-mode control of inductive loads (ripple-frequency doubling); prior-art floor constraining new control-method claims while freeing implementation. U-014, U-030 context.

title: Phase-shifting control full-bridge zero-current converter and DC switching power source
title_zh: 相移控制全桥零电流转换器及直流开关电源
assignee: Xi'an Actionpower Electric Co., Ltd. (西安爱科赛博电气股份有限公司)
status_note: Displays as rejected after publication (2019-03-15) on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: phase-shift full-bridge ZCS lagging arm via auxiliary low-voltage MOS + blocking cap
indep_claim_gist: Phase-shift full-bridge converter integrating two series low-voltage MOS transistors with blocking capacitor at transformer primary achieving zero-current switching of lagging bridge arm while retaining ZVS on leading arm across load range.
notes: The one on-point GP-indexed ORGANIC filing for the CN fast-control leader (CS-G card 1) — REJECTED 2019. But see CN102751772A (verified this pass): 爱科赛博 DOES hold a live XJTU-acquired bidirectional family. Posture: 198-patent portfolio (2025 IR) not visible as magnet-converter claims. U-034, U-035 context.

title: Three-inductance and double-Buck inverter
assignee: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics
status_note: Granted 2016-04-20; displays as Expired - Fee Related (terminated 2021-09-05) on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: three-inductor dual-buck bridge, reduced filter magnetics, shoot-through-free class
indep_claim_gist: Inverter with two switch tubes and diodes in bridge arms, dual DC filter inductors spanning bridge midpoints plus one AC filter inductor to output capacitor and load, shrinking magnetic volume versus classic dual-buck.
notes: Representative of the CN academic dual-buck estate (shoot-through-immune bipolar output stages — a natural SiC 4Q building block). Displays expired-fee 2021 — indicatively unencumbered topology class in CN; verify before reliance. U-014 design-freedom context.

title: Interleaved multi-channel, multi-level, multi-quadrant DC-DC converters
assignee: ABB Schweiz AG
status_note: Active, expires 2034-12-28 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: interleaved parallel multi-quadrant multi-level DC-DC subcircuits minimizing terminal ripple
indep_claim_gist: DC-DC converter: two or more multi-quadrant multi-level switching subcircuits paralleled at input and output, common DC input having three or more voltage levels; control interleaves per-phase duty-cycled switching to reduce input- and output-side ripple current.
notes: Verified twice this run: FPO full text (https://www.freepatentsonline.com/10978948.html) during 503 window, then GP after recovery. Top live architectural blocker for an interleaved multi-level SiC 4Q stage; design-around hinge = the 3+-level-input limitation (two-level phases), single-subcircuit multiphase, or coupled-inductor cancellation. FPO displays PCT/US2015/063736; WO2015108613A1 sibling NOT confirmed (GP displays only US20160329811A1). U-014, U-015.

title: Synchrotron magnet power supply control system and control method, and synchrotron
assignee: Hitachi Ltd
status_note: WO publication; international filing date shown, earlier priority and national-phase status NOT displayed on FPO page fetched; indicative
claim_theme: shared main acceleration pattern + per-magnet corrective patterns summed to magnet supplies
notes: FPO biblio+abstract depth per A-07 (claims not rendered). Computer manages one shared main pattern + individual corrective patterns; control devices sum and drive each bending-magnet PS. Indicative national expiry ~2031. Control-pattern claims, not converter hardware — nearest control-side art to WS-P07-4 array orchestration; P08 seam. U-017.

title: State space controller and gradient power amplifier
assignee: Shanghai Neusoft Medical Technology Co., Ltd.
status_note: No status line on FPO page fetched; indicative expiry ~2038 (20y from US filing 2018-07-10) — verify before reliance
family: CN201710561177.2 (CN priority application as displayed on FPO)
claim_theme: delay-compensated state-space digital current controller for gradient power amplifier
indep_claim_gist: State-space controller: integrator of gradient-coil current deviation plus delay compensator with exactly two delayed feedback taps (one- and two-cycle delays, weighted by compensation coefficients) subtracted at an error node, generating PWM drive for the power stack.
notes: CN-family via CN priority 201710561177.2 (2017-07-11). Narrow digital-implementation claim ('only two feedback loops') — alternative compensator structures avoid. Nearest art to WS-P07-1 control half. U-015 context.

title: Method/system for switched frequency ripple reduction in MRI gradient coils
assignee: General Electric Company
status_note: No status line on FPO page fetched; 20y-from-filing indicative expiry 2023-08-01 — verify before reliance
claim_theme: transformer-coupled out-of-phase ripple-injection network at the gradient coil
indep_claim_gist: Gradient coil system: first inductor feeds switched-amplifier current to the coil; a second inductor, transformer-coupled to the first with series capacitor returned to the amplifier, delivers a second current substantially out of phase, cancelling switching ripple at the coil.
notes: Expired-class (indicative 2023) coupled-inductor ripple cancellation AT a coil load — narrows WS-P07-2 absence to live/non-MRI/WBG space; freedom-supporting floor with US6437999B1. U-014, U-015 context.

title: Power output stage for bipolar operational power supply
assignee: Forbro Design Corp
status_note: Expired-class by age (1971 grant); FPO renders biblio + PDF only for pre-OCR era; indicative
claim_theme: linear bipolar operational power supply output stage (Kepco-BOP heritage)
notes: Biblio-depth record (claims not rendered on page). Forbro = Kepco-affiliated design lineage; anchors the U-030 BOP heritage floor for WS-P07-5.

title: Bipolar power supply system
assignee: LHV Power Corporation
status_note: No status line on FPO page fetched; 20y-from-filing indicative expiry ~2025-08-04 (+unknown PTA) — verify before reliance
claim_theme: series-stacked positive+negative supplies steered by programming-voltage threshold, no mechanical polarity switch
indep_claim_gist: Bipolar supply: negative and positive supplies connected in series; control circuit compares a programming voltage to a 1.6 V reference and selectively activates one supply, switching output polarity without mechanical devices; output current proportional to the voltage difference.
notes: Borderline expiry (indicative ~2025 + unknown PTA) — risk set low, not none, until verified. Architecture midway between polarity-reversal (Heinzinger-style) and true 4Q. U-030, U-014 context.

title: Power electronic circuits with ripple current cancellation
assignee: Technical Witts, Inc. (Wittenbreder)
status_note: No status line on FPO page fetched; 20y-from-filing indicative expiry 2021-05-12 — verify before reliance
claim_theme: coupled-inductor zero-ripple network; spec discloses full-bridge 4Q zero-ripple embodiment
indep_claim_gist: Three-terminal power conversion network of six inductors, four capacitors, two switches; two inductors connect at each network terminal arranged so their ripple currents substantially cancel; specification extends to a full-bridge four-quadrant zero-ripple embodiment (Fig. 13, twelve coupled inductors).
notes: Expired-class ripple-steering floor: 4Q + zero-ripple coupled-inductor combination is disclosed (spec) though claims are the 3-terminal network — constrains novelty of naive coupled-inductor claims, frees implementation. WS-P07-2 nearest. U-014, U-015.

title: Bipolar power supply
assignee: Micro Control Company
status_note: Expired-class by age (indicative expiry ~2012); no status line on FPO page fetched
claim_theme: linear bipolar output: dual op-amps + complementary MOSFETs from +/- rails, anti-shoot-through offset
notes: US classes 323/316, 330/265, 363/63 displayed (no CPC on FPO page). First-run queue label 'Kepco-lineage' CORRECTED: assignee is Micro Control Company (burn-in test equipment). Linear 4Q heritage floor. U-030.

title: Gradient amplifier and drive circuit thereof
assignee: Shanghai Neusoft Medical Technology Co., Ltd.
status_note: No status line on FPO page fetched; indicative expiry ~2038 (20y from US filing 2018-01-25) — verify before reliance
family: CN201710060847.2 (CN priority application as displayed on FPO)
claim_theme: N paralleled working H-bridge groups + N freewheeling half-bridge branches around gradient coil
indep_claim_gist: Gradient amplifier: N working half-bridge groups (N>1) forming two alternate bidirectional current paths from supply through the gradient coil, plus N freewheeling half-bridge groups of emitter-to-emitter coupled switch pairs clamped across the coil coupling points.
notes: CN-family via CN priority 201710060847.2. Live paralleled-bridge output-stage claim; requires the distinct bidirectional-blocking freewheeling branch — omit that branch and claim 1 does not read. Part of the Neusoft live trio narrowing WS-P07-2. U-014.

title: Gradient amplifier
assignee: Shanghai Neusoft Medical Technology Co., Ltd.
status_note: No status line on FPO page fetched; indicative expiry ~2037 (20y from US filing 2017-08-22) — verify before reliance
family: CN201610784582.6 (CN priority application as displayed on FPO)
claim_theme: two parallel H-bridges interleaved at 90 degrees + DM/CM filter into gradient coil
indep_claim_gist: Gradient amplifier: controller outputs pulse signals to a power amplifying circuit of two parallel H-bridge circuits with 90-degree phase difference between corresponding switching tubes; differential-mode and common-mode inductor/capacitor filter network delivers cleaned driving current to the gradient coil.
notes: CN-family via CN priority 201610784582.6. CLOSEST LIVE CLAIM to an interleaved SiC bipolar FastCoil output stage found in any pass; scope tied to gradient-amplifier context and the recited DM/CM interconnection order. Design-around: different phase count/angle, coupled-inductor filter, or claim-scope argument on load context (counsel question). U-014, U-015.

title: Systems and methods for providing gradient power for an MRI system
assignee: GE Precision Healthcare LLC
status_note: No status line on FPO page fetched; indicative expiry ~2038-2040 — verify before reliance
claim_theme: multi-amplifier gradient driver fed from shared high-frequency power-distribution DC bus
indep_claim_gist: MRI system: gradient driver comprising multiple gradient amplifiers, each a single H-bridge switch configuration coupled to a gradient coil, all fed DC from a high-frequency power distribution unit converting AC mains onto one shared DC bus.
notes: Priority 2018-02-21 = parent application filing per FPO (continuation; parent number not displayed). MRI+HFPDU-scoped; a LF-rectified shared bulk bus differs. Nearest live art to shared-bulk multi-channel array drive (WS-P07-4). U-017 context.

title: Coaxial valve structure of ultralow inductance
title_zh: 超低电感同轴阀组结构
assignee: Anhui University
status_note: Active as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: coaxial press-fit valve stack; support columns double as current-return path, minimizing stray inductance
notes: Surfaced by run-1 citation chase off CN106100370B (lead had attributed ASIPP; GP displays Anhui University — record as displayed). Fusion-tagged (Y02E30/10) pulsed-switch packaging for pulse amplitude/di-dt — brushes SiC commutation-loop packaging; design-around: laminated busbar per expired CN101478224B floor. U-014 construction context.

title: A type bus bar stacking method for large power pulse switch power supply
title_zh: 大功率脉冲开关电源A型母排叠层方法
assignee: Institute of Modern Physics, CAS (中国科学院近代物理研究所)
status_note: Displays as Expired - Fee Related (terminated 2013-09-26) on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: laminated copper busbar construction for high-power pulsed SMPS, minimized loop inductance/EMI
notes: Four parallel rectifier bridges + two IGBT modules on a common cooling plate; layered copper-coin busbars on 7-35 mm pad posts minimize wiring inductance/EMI. Expired construction floor; IMP self-build posture datum (U-018, U-020 context).

title: High-precision pulse power supply regulator and method based on frequency domain
assignee: QXP Technologies Inc. (transferred 2022; orig. Xi'an Institute of Optics and Precision Mechanics, CAS)
status_note: Active, anticipated expiration 2034-12-20 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: DDS + FPGA + high-precision DAC frequency-domain pulse power-supply regulator
notes: Live CAS-spinout digital-regulator estate (transfer to QXP 2022 shows institute IP does commercialize). DDS variable-frequency waveform + DAC + FPGA control/compute, bit-by-bit voltage adjustment without lookup tables. Nearest art to WS-P07-6 setpoint absence. U-015, U-033.

title: High-accuracy general soft-core digital power regulator of ionic accelerator
title_zh: 离子加速器高精度通用软核数字电源调节器
assignee: Institute of Modern Physics, CAS (中国科学院近代物理研究所)
status_note: Application deemed withdrawn after publication (2011-09-28) as displayed on GP; indicative
claim_theme: FPGA soft-core universal digital regulator for accelerator power supplies, multi-topology
notes: Withdrawn — institute abandon-pattern datum (with CN106100370B, CN101478224B): CN accelerator institutes file then drop converter/regulator claims. FPGA EP2C35 + high-res ADC/DAC + PWM channels + sync/fault interfaces. U-018 context.

title: Storage battery charge and discharge circuit topology
assignee: Xi'an Actionpower Electric Co., Ltd. (西安爱科赛博电气; original assignee Xi'an Jiaotong University)
status_note: Granted 2015-08-05; Active, expires 2032-07-05 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: 3-phase PWM AFE + isolated dual-H-bridge bidirectional charge/discharge, DSP control
notes: The fast-control leader's LIVE bidirectional estate (XJTU-acquired) — corrects run-1 'no live filings' nuance. Battery-scoped 2Q (current reversal), not bipolar-voltage 4Q magnet drive; AFE doubles as SVG. Unit-PF charge/discharge, 650 V DC link. U-034/U-035 posture context.

title: Power converter
assignee: Toshiba Mitsubishi-Electric Industrial Systems Corp (TMEIC)
status_note: Active, expires 2039-08-20 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: inverter-transformer energization: detected inrush lowers voltage-control feedforward gain
notes: JP accelerator-PS vendor's live claims are generic converter control (transformer inrush suppression), not magnet-converter claims — merchant-absence datum for U-019. No overlap with 4Q output stages or precision chains.

title: Synchronous rectifier circuit
assignee: Kikusui Electronics Corp (菊水電子工業)
status_note: Active, anticipated expiration 2042-03-04 as displayed on GP; indicative — verify before reliance
claim_theme: bidirectional sync-rect CC-mode startup: error-amp input switched voltage-to-current to prevent inrush
indep_claim_gist: Synchronous-rectifier bidirectional converter operated in constant-current mode; control circuit switches the error-amplifier input from output-voltage monitoring to current monitoring on transition from startup, first matching output voltage to a connected live external source to prevent inrush.
notes: Bench-4Q vendor (PBZ line) live claim is startup housekeeping — no output-stage, bandwidth, or precision-chain claims; WS-P07-5 datum. Addresses motoring and regeneration modes. U-030.
